startup.tip.model_switch: Use /model to switch model providers and model names quickly.
startup.tip.chat_new: Type /chat new to start a fresh thread while keeping workspace context.
startup.tip.chat_switch: Use /chat switch <name|id|index> to jump between task threads.
startup.tip.chat_list: Run /chat list to view all chats in the current workspace.
startup.tip.workspace_list: Use /workspace list to see every registered workspace.
startup.tip.workspace_switch: Run /workspace switch <name|id|path> before starting work on another project.
startup.tip.workspace_create: Use /workspace create <path> --name <name> to register a new project space.
startup.tip.memory_status: Type /memory status to check whether memory is enabled and ready.
startup.tip.memory_remember: Use /memory remember <text> to save stable preferences for later sessions.
startup.tip.memory_search: Run /memory search <query> when you want to recall prior decisions.
startup.tip.execution_policy_show: Use /execution-policy show to inspect current execution confirmation mode.
startup.tip.shell_prefix: Prefix local shell commands with !, for example !git status.
startup.tip.clear_context: Use /clear context to reset AI context but keep command history.
startup.tip.clear_input_history: Use /clear input history to clear terminal input history.
startup.tip.mcp_status: Use /mcp status to inspect MCP server health and loading state.
startup.tip.shift_enter: Press Shift+Enter to insert a newline, and press Enter to send.
startup.tip.help: Use /help to view built-in commands whenever you are unsure.
input.shell_mode_hint: Prefix a command with ! to run it locally

workspace.usage.remove_files_detail: --remove-files: Deletes {config_dirname}/ under this custom workspace root, including {app_name} data such as history, temp, skills, memory, and indexes; it will not delete the workspace root or other project files.
workspace.usage.note_delete_remove_files: Note: --remove-files deletes {config_dirname}/ under this custom workspace root and all of its files and subdirectories; it will not delete the workspace root or other project files.
workspace.help.note.default_workspace: - The default workspace is always named Default, and its data directory remains workspace/ next to config.jsonc
workspace.help.note.custom_storage: - {app_name} data for custom workspaces is stored under that workspace's {config_dirname}/
workspace.help.note.delete_behavior: - /workspace delete removes registry entries by default; with --remove-files it deletes that custom workspace's {config_dirname}/ and all contents, but not the workspace root or other project files.
workspace.help.note.quote_paths: - Use quotes when a path or name contains spaces

execution_policy.show.unlimited_desc: All operations execute directly without safety checks or confirmations.Type {moderate_cmd} to switch to moderate; type {confirmation_cmd} to switch back to confirmation.
execution_policy.show.unlimited_warning: Warning: high-risk operations will also execute directly. Use only in fully controlled environments.
execution_policy.show.moderate_desc: Safe operations are evaluated by AI before execution; if judged safe, y/n confirmation is skipped automatically. AI safety judgment may be wrong, so use with caution.Type {confirmation_cmd} to switch back to confirmation.
execution_policy.show.confirmation_desc: Operations requiring confirmation will always ask y/n.Type {moderate_cmd} to switch to moderate; type {unlimited_cmd} to switch to unlimited.
memory_status.header: Experiential memory status details (internalized lessons/preferences, not a document store):
memory_status.disabled_hint: Experiential memory is disabled. Use /memory enable to turn it back on.
memory_status.note: Note: after each natural-language task completes normally, background auto-reflection may run (roughly 45+ seconds apart from the previous trigger); entries are written only when the model finds reusable lessons (possibly zero entries). You can also use memory_search / memory_add or /memory remember manually.
memory_status.initializing: Memory module is initializing or failed. Check {log_file} and workspace/memory/ under the config directory.
memory_status.unavailable: Experiential memory is unavailable (initialization failed); the main program can continue running.
